official_code.relationship_to_paper: Latest official commit fetched on 2026-07-10. It predates the 2026-06-26 arXiv v2 update but is not identified as an immutable paper-time release, so code observations are reported separately from paper claims.

official_dataset.inspection: Hugging Face repository metadata and complete path manifest were inspected via the official API; the multi-gigabyte data blobs were not downloaded locally.
official_dataset.relationship_to_paper: The dataset revision predates arXiv v2 and publicly exposes tasks, rubrics, ground-truth images/state/code, so it supports artifact inspection but is not a private evaluation set.

scope_limit: The complete paper and complete pinned code snapshot were read/inspected. Dataset repository metadata and all 730 paths were inspected, but large scientific data and image blobs were not downloaded or executed. No commercial agent/model reruns were performed.
